Class KofiService

java.lang.Object
dev.chojo.aether.kofi.service.KofiService
public abstract class KofiService extends Object
Service for handling Ko-fi webhooks and managing purchases and subscriptions.

  • Constructor Details

    • KofiService

      public KofiService(Kofi configuration, UserProvider userProvider, MailService mailService, SupporterConfiguration<?,?,?> supporterConfiguration)
      Creates a new KofiService.
      Parameters:
      configuration - The Ko-fi configuration.
      userProvider - The user provider for resolving Discord users.
      mailService - The mail service for managing user emails and sending notifications.
      supporterConfiguration - The supporter configuration for mapping products to subscriptions.

  • Method Details

    • handle

      public void handle(KofiTransaction data)
      Handles a Ko-fi transaction from a webhook.
      Parameters:
      data - The transaction data.
      Throws:
      UnauthorizedException - If the verification token is invalid.

    • registerPurchase

      protected abstract void registerPurchase(KofiPurchase purchase)
      Registers a purchase in the persistent storage.
      Parameters:
      purchase - The purchase to register.

    • enableSubscription

      public SubscriptionResult enableSubscription(KofiPurchase purchase, net.dv8tion.jda.api.entities.Guild guild)
      Enables a subscription for a guild based on a purchase.
      Parameters:
      purchase - The purchase to use.
      guild - The guild to enable the subscription for.
      Returns:
      The result of the operation.

    • disableSubscription

      public boolean disableSubscription(KofiPurchase purchase)
      Disables a subscription for a guild.
      Parameters:
      purchase - The purchase to disable.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise.

    • expiredPurchases

      protected abstract List<KofiPurchase> expiredPurchases()
      Returns:
      A list of expired purchases that should be removed.

    • create

      public List<KofiPurchase> create(KofiTransaction transaction)
      Creates KofiPurchase objects from a KofiTransaction.
      Parameters:
      transaction - The transaction to process.
      Returns:
      A list of created purchases.

    • guildSubscriptions

      protected abstract Subscriptions guildSubscriptions(long guildId)
      Retrieves the subscriptions for a guild.
      Parameters:
      guildId - The ID of the guild.
      Returns:
      The subscriptions.

    • buildPurchase

      public abstract KofiPurchase buildPurchase(String mailHash, String transactionId, String key, Type type, long subscriptionId, Instant expiresAt)
      Builds a KofiPurchase object.
      Parameters:
      mailHash - The mail hash of the purchaser.
      transactionId - The transaction ID.
      key - The key of the product (tier name or shop item code).
      type - The type of purchase.
      subscriptionId - The ID of the associated subscription.
      expiresAt - The expiration date (for subscriptions).
      Returns:
      The created purchase object.
